title: Cleanup CLI duplicates the excluded-path policy instead of deriving it from the index-scope SSOT
recommendation: Export a data-level excluded segment list or SQL predicate builder from the policy module and use it in collectSummary() and buildPlan().

title: Operator README lists stable action strings but does not give the cleanup and rollback flow at the invariant entry point
recommendation: Add a Repair / Verify / Rollback subsection under Index Scope Invariants with cleanup commands, expected counts, DB backup/restore guidance, and audit action expectations.

title: ADR-008 through ADR-012 omit alternatives, leaving future maintainers to re-litigate late-stage choices
recommendation: Add a concrete alternatives table to ADR-008 through ADR-012 with rejected options and rejection rationale.

title: Invariant tests duplicate partial memory_index schemas instead of sharing a DB-shape fixture
recommendation: Create a composable tests/fixtures/memory-index-db.ts schema helper and migrate invariant tests to use it.
